title: pityrogramma brackenridgei
intro: Pityrogramma brackenridgei, also known as the 'Makalapua fern', is a species of tree fern native to Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The Makalapua fern has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pityrogramma brackenridgei often include infusions and decoctions of the plant's rhizomes and leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
